excluded_addons.@xterm/addon-attach: native PTY backend; no WebSocket transport intersection
excluded_addons.@xterm/addon-unicode-graphemes: upstream experimental and excluded from the completion gate

webview_requirements.image_webassembly: script-src permits only 'wasm-unsafe-eval' in addition to 'self'
webview_requirements.renderer: WebGL2 automatic attempt with one-way DOM fallback

layer3_rule: Layer 2 operates with Layer 3 empty or omitted; optional UI, preferences, initial product values, and userland remain Layer 3.
device_validation: SIXEL or iTerm inline image rendering and WebAssembly policy
search, Unicode 11, web-font, and ligature capability activation
